parent._value: Rowen the Fairy and the Cursed Doll

0._value: I think #p305# in #m10002000# has something to ask me...

1._value: I ran into #b#p305##k again, who gave me #t4031031# for #p320#, #p608#'s son. Back then, she seemed to be keeping her guard up against humans, but now, it looks like she accepts me as #p320#'s friend... #p305# is assistant to the head magician of Ellinia, #p313#, and she tells me that he is concerned about the #t4000033#s that he made with his black magic a long, long time ago. The dolls had been sealed up for a while, until a bunch of #o35#s took them and ran away. The #o35#s have since become zombies and have been destroying the forest. To return the forest to how it was before, someone needs to take down the #r#o38#s#k and take the #b#t4000033#s#k away from them... So, I readily accepted the request to collect #b50 cursed dolls#k, but I fear those crazy monkeys may be too much to handle...

2._value: I eliminated a bunch of #o38#s in a forest near #m10002000# and collected all #b50 #t4000033#s#k for Rowen. In return, she gave me 7 ores. I hope the forest will return to normal...

0._value: You're #p320#'s friend. You came at just the right time. It's not easy for me to ask a human for help, but... I have a hunch that I can trust you on this.

1._value: Allow me to introduce myself. I'm #p305#, secretary of the Head Magician in this town, #b#p313##k. We've been looking for a traveler who can help us out. Well, would you like to hear the whole story?

2._value: #p313# used to be very much into #bblack magic#k, which was considered off limits. Black magic is VERY powerful, but there's a chance it can backfire and the Magician casting the magic might lose the ability to use magic altogether. So it's very potent but requires utmost caution.

3._value: #p313# wasn't fully trained, but he thought he could handle it. He tried to bring a straw doll to life. Anyone with half a brain knows that magic that has to do with life itself is absolutely forbidden!

4._value: Something went terribly wrong in the process and the curse of black magic seeped into the doll, transforming it into a #r#t4000033##k that had to be sealed up forever. In the end, #p313# sealed the #t4000033# up and placed it somewhere unknown.

5._value: But then the #o35#s that live around #m10002000# forest took the doll. When they returned to the forest, they became zombies. The #rZombie #o35#s#k are now wreaking havoc in the forest. #p313# assigned me to handle the situation, but he couldn't really expect me to resolve the whole thing alone.

6._value: To get the forest back to the way it used to be, we need to kill the #rZombie #o35#s#k and remove the #b#t4000033#s#k. I'm awfully busy here, so will you do this in my place?

0._value: Thank you so much. The #o38#s have been frequently sighted in the Monkey Forest near #m10002000#. Please hunt #r50 #o38#s#k and bring me #b50#k #b#t4000033#s#k. You will be well rewarded.
I see... I thought you were the right person to ask, but I guess I was wrong... I understand that you're busy, but if you ever have a change of heart, please find me.
This is... Wow! You've brought me 50 #t4000033#s! That means you've thinned out the #o38#s. But it's too early to be relieved, because this doll is capable of continuously making new puppets.

1._value: Oh yeah, take this as a token of my appreciation. The fairies will spread word of your good deed. I personally think you deserve to be called a hero, and not just because you saved me from a pickle!

0._value: I have increased your fame a little. I've also gotten you some ores from the forest. Please put them to good use. So long!
Don’t forget to defeat the #r#o38#s#k as well.
So, you weren't able to collect #b50 #t4000033#s#k yet. The #t4000033# is making more Puppets of itself as we speak. You need to hurry up and bring me the dolls.
